You'll Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now? — React Basics: Class? Hooks? — (3)
You'll Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now?

Function Component? Class Component? React Hooks? What even are these things? In this post we'll get to know the two ways of writing React and what makes them different. We'll convert the same counter from a Class Component into a Function Component, and then walk through the two rules you have to follow when using React Hooks.
